title: centaurea hanryi subsp. spina-badia
intro: Centaurea hanryi subsp. spina-badia, also known as Spina-badia or Spina-badie Centaury, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Centaurea hanryi subsp. spina-badia include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and even help manage stress and anxiety. Centaurea hanryi subsp. spina-badia can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine for its purported health benefits.
